articles.title_en: A fire in a warehouse was extinguished in the south-east of Moscow
articles.lead_en: There were no injuries, the Russian Emergency Situations Ministry reported.
articles.title_raw: На юго-востоке Москвы потушили пожар на складе

articles.title_en: Putin sends condolences to Xi Jinping over deadly mine accident
articles.lead_en: The Russian president asked the Chinese leader to convey his sympathy and support to the families of those killed and his wishes for a swift recovery to those injured

articles.title_en: In South Ossetia, the search for the missing Russian woman was suspended until the morning
articles.lead_en: The events will involve personnel from the regional fire and rescue units of the Ministry of Emergency Situations, as well as 50 people each from the Ministry of Defense and the Ministry of Internal Affairs
articles.title_raw: В Южной Осетии приостановили поиски пропавшей россиянки до утра
articles.lead_raw: К мероприятиям привлекут личный состав районных пожарно-спасательных частей МЧС, а также по 50 человек из Минобороны и МВД
